SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-31-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-31-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF. DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: J. BERTELSEN; NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BENTON, SARAH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EXTRA SPACE STRORAGE INC. $300.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $300.00, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF TESTIFIED HER UNIT WAS PAID IN FULL THROUGH JUNE 2018 AT WHICH TIME DEFENDANT DENIED HER ACCESS. DAMAGES ARE FOR LOSS OF USE ONLY; PLAINTIFF OFFERED NO EVIDENCE THAT DEFENDANT HAS SOLD OR DISPOSED OF HER PROPERTY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED DEC-03-2018 ORDERED DESTROYED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY BENTON, SARAH AS TO DEFENDANT EXTRA SPACE STRORAGE INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-03-2018 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
